author: Blake
subject: Add Social Media Command Center — content calendar, AI generation, multi-platform publishing
body:
New "Social Media" facility tab with unified content management across
Facebook, Instagram, and Google Business Profile. Features:

- Content calendar with monthly/weekly views and storage-specific seasonal markers
- AI batch generator: creates 5-20 posts at once using Claude with full facility context
- Post composer for manual creation with platform-specific formatting
- Publishing to Facebook Pages, Instagram (via Graph API), and GBP
- Draft/scheduled/published workflow with inline editing and status tracking
- Platform breakdown metrics and content mix overview

All new files — does not modify existing publish-ad.js, gbp-posts.js,
platform-connections.js, PublishTab.tsx, or GBPTab.tsx. Reads from
existing platform_connections and gbp_connections for OAuth tokens.

author: Blake
subject: Add Revenue Loss Calculator — Zoom closer with 6-category loss analysis
body:
New "Revenue Gap" facility tab that calculates annual revenue loss across
6 categories: vacancy drag, rate gap, marketing void, competitor capture,
churn bleed, and discount drag. Includes animated debt clock, what-if
recovery slider, breakeven callout, 12-month side-by-side projections
(inaction vs StowStack), and print support. Works with PMS data or falls
back to audit form estimates for cold leads.

author: Blake
subject: Security hardening: fix 18 vulnerabilities across API and config
body:
- Fix wildcard CORS on Stripe checkout and billing portal endpoints
- Add SSRF protection to proxy-video (domain allowlist + private IP blocking)
- Add SSRF protection to scrape-website (private IP/hostname blocking)
- Fix SQL injection vector in hasField() via field name allowlist
- Replace timing-vulnerable === with crypto.timingSafeEqual for admin keys
- Add rate limiting to consumer-lead and meta-capi endpoints
- Add HSTS, CSP, and X-XSS-Protection security headers
- Remove internal error message leak from meta-capi responses
- Strengthen HTML escaping (add single-quote) in audit-form
- Prevent email header injection via newline stripping in subjects
- Add Stripe metadata cleanup for temp passwords in checkout-success
- Make DB SSL verification configurable (default to strict)
- Remove CORS origin reflection from V1 API (machine-to-machine)
- Use crypto.randomUUID for event ID generation in pixel tracking

author: Blake
subject: Full Stripe checkout with subscriptions, billing, and plan enforcement
body:
- 3-tier subscriptions: Launch ($499), Growth ($999), Portfolio ($1,499)
- Annual billing option (save 2 months) with monthly/annual toggle
- Promo code support via Stripe promotion codes
- Auto-provision landing pages with StorEdge embed for Growth/Portfolio
- Plan upgrade/downgrade detection syncs plan + facility limits
- Subscription enforcement middleware blocks writes for canceled orgs
- Grace period: past_due orgs get 7-day read-only access
- Billing emails: payment failed, recovered, subscription canceled
- Webhook event logging for full audit trail
- invoice.payment_succeeded handler auto-recovers from past_due
- Usage metering endpoint for plan limits visibility
- Homepage pricing CTAs link to /partner checkout flow
- Partner portal dunning banners for past_due/canceled/incomplete
- Consistent launch/growth/portfolio naming across all files
- DB migration renames legacy starter/enterprise plan rows

author: angelo
subject: Add Market Intelligence system to facility Overview
body:
New market scanning engine that gathers competitive and environmental
data for each facility:

- Competitors: Google Places search for nearby storage facilities with
  ratings, review counts, distance (haversine), Maps/website links
- Demand Drivers: scans for apartments, universities, military bases,
  real estate offices, moving companies, senior living within 5 miles
- Demographics: Census ACS 2022 data — population, median income,
  median age, renter %, median home value by zip code
- Operator Notes: editable textarea for manual market context

All data cached in facility_market_intel table, automatically fed into
marketing plan generation. UI shows competitors as cards, demand
drivers grouped by category, demographics as stat cards. "Scan Market"
button triggers the full analysis.

author: Blake
subject: Raise pricing to $499/$999/$1,499 — position for B2B SaaS value
body:
Pre-launch pricing that reflects real value vs agencies ($1,500-3,000/mo).
Zero setup fees to reduce friction. Updated breakeven calc, ROI math,
referral credits, and all internal/partner pricing to match.

author: Blake
subject: Update pricing to $297/$597/$997 good/better/best tiers (Launch/Growth/Portfolio)
body:
Consistent 3-tier structure across website, admin billing, partner portal, and
partner signup. Zero setup fees, psychological pricing, updated ROI math,
feature lists reflect all built tools. Referral tiers and mock data aligned.

author: angelo
subject: Increase marketing plan timeout to 120s and surface all errors
body:
Sonnet + 8192 tokens needs more than 60s. Also the UI was silently
swallowing errors — now shows alert with status code and message
for any failure.

author: angelo
subject: Deepen marketing plan: replace quick wins with strategic rationale
body:
Plan prompt rewritten to demand explanatory depth. Every recommendation
must explain WHY — not just what to do but the reasoning chain from
data to action. Tab directives expanded to 3-4 sentences with strategic
context. Bottleneck analysis goes to root cause. Summary is a thesis.
Replaced quick_wins with strategic_rationale — 3-5 deeper insights
that connect the dots between data points and strategic decisions.
The operator should read this and understand the thinking, not just
follow instructions.

author: angelo
subject: Rewrite marketing plan prompt for depth, specificity, and real insight
body:
System prompt now demands operator-level strategic thinking grounded
in actual facility data. Every field requires specific references to
the facility's numbers, not generic advice. Tab directives expanded
to 2-3 sentences with emotional hooks, specific audience references,
and data-backed reasoning. Bottleneck analysis must diagnose the real
why. Summary must be a thesis, not a list. Quick wins must be things
you can do TODAY. The test: if you can swap in another facility's name
and the plan still works, it's too generic.

author: angelo
subject: Use claude-sonnet-4 matching working model in facility-creatives

author: angelo
subject: Fix Sonnet model ID to dated version claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022

author: angelo
subject: Upgrade marketing plan to Sonnet 3.5 and add PMS unit data
body:
Switched from Haiku to claude-3-5-sonnet-latest for significantly
better plan quality and reliable tab_directives generation. Added
PMS unit inventory data (types, counts, vacancy, pricing, features,
occupancy, move-in/out trends) to the plan context. Sonnet costs
more per generation but the plan is the strategic foundation for
everything else — quality matters here.

author: angelo
subject: Increase max_tokens to 8192 and constrain plan output size

author: Blake
subject: feat: add full BR-PT translation + ENG/PT toggle to Admin Guide
body:
Complete Brazilian Portuguese translation of the entire Admin Guide for Anna,
with a persistent ENG/BR PT language toggle button in the header. Added new
"O que é o StowStack?" intro section explaining the business model, clients,
key metrics, and industry context. Significantly expanded all 12 sections with
detailed descriptions so Anna can learn each feature, its purpose, and how it
connects to the core business — all natively in Portuguese.

author: angelo
subject: Move tab_directives to first field in marketing plan output
body:
Haiku was running out of tokens before reaching tab_directives at the
end of the JSON. Moved it to the very first field with explicit
instruction that it MUST be generated first. Trimmed descriptions
on other fields to save tokens.

author: angelo
subject: Simplify PlanContextBar to directive-only — no more full plan in tabs
body:
Stripped the context bar down to a single actionable instruction per
tab. No expandable sections, no audiences, no channel strategy, no
pillars. Just the sparkle icon + one sentence telling you what to do
in this tab to address the marketing plan's goals.

author: angelo
subject: Add per-tab action directives to marketing plan context bar
body:
Marketing plan now generates tab_directives — one specific actionable
instruction per creative tab that tells the user exactly what to do
there to address the bottleneck. Directives are always visible (no
expand needed), shown with a sparkle icon above the collapsible
detail panel. Each directive references the plan's strategy and
connects it to the specific tool in that tab.

author: angelo
subject: Thread marketing plan across all creative tabs via shared PlanContextBar
body:
New PlanContextBar component fetches the active marketing plan once
and displays tab-specific context:
- Creative: messaging pillars, target audiences, quick wins
- Google Ads: Google-specific channel strategy, budget %, tactics
- TikTok: messaging themes and social-relevant audiences
- Video AI: video content direction aligned with pillars
- Landing Pages: audience segments to build pages for

Each tab shows only the plan sections relevant to its purpose.
Bottleneck analysis shown everywhere. Collapsible by default.
Replaces the inline plan fetch in CreativeTab with the shared
component for consistency.

author: Blake
subject: fix: always load BetaPad + fix all 3 toggle methods
body:
Removed VITE_BETAPAD env var gate so BetaPad loads in production.
Fixed Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+B to match both upper and lowercase 'b'.
Removed conflicting single-key shortcuts that blocked "notepad" typing.
All 3 methods now work: FAB click, Cmd/Ctrl+Shift+B, type "notepad".

author: Blake
subject: feat: type "notepad" anywhere to toggle BetaPad overlay

author: Blake
subject: fix: support Cmd+Shift+B keyboard shortcut for BetaPad on Mac

author: angelo
subject: Lock horizontal scroll on html/body to prevent mobile float-past

author: angelo
subject: Fix mobile overflow across all facility dashboard tabs
body:
- OverviewTab: context form and playbook grid collapse to single column
- GoogleAdsLab: score breakdown 5→3 cols, cost estimate 4→2 cols on mobile
- VideoGenerator: image grid 6→4 cols on mobile
- TikTokCreator: preview container uses max-w instead of fixed width,
  image grid 6→4 cols on mobile
- CreativeTab: edit grids collapse to single column, textarea uses
  w-full on mobile

author: Blake
subject: feat: add BetaPad — internal QA, bug reporting, and feature tracking overlay
body:
Global overlay system for alpha/beta testing with 4 tabs (Quick Note,
Bug Report, Feature Request, Session Log), auto-captured metadata,
5 export formats (Claude Prompt, Markdown, JSON, GitHub Issues, CSV),
smart detection (rage clicks, slow loads, CLS, JS errors), and a
review dashboard at /admin/betapad. Lazy-loaded behind VITE_BETAPAD
env var — zero bundle impact in production.

author: angelo
subject: Fix facility sub-tab bar scrolling with 12+ tabs
body:
Added overflow-x-auto, hidden scrollbar, whitespace-nowrap, and
flex-shrink-0 so tabs scroll horizontally instead of wrapping or
getting cut off.

author: Blake
subject: fix: infinite loop scroll and improved text layout for dev ticker
body:
Duplicates card list for seamless infinite scroll (snaps back at midpoint).
Better visual hierarchy: larger titles, italic flavor text, hidden scrollbar.

author: Blake
subject: feat: add GBP posts, Google Ads lab, PMS-enriched creatives, and broad UI polish
body:
- API: facility-creatives now includes PMS unit/snapshot/specials data for richer
  ad copy generation; gbp-posts and google-ads-keywords endpoints expanded
- Dashboard: new GBP tab enhancements, Google Ads keyword lab, landing pages tab
  improvements, command palette and facilities view refinements
- UI: consistent auth imports, PWA manifest branding update, sidebar nav cleanup,
  blog/legal/portal component polish, service worker updates
- Data: commits.json updated with latest history

author: Blake
subject: feat: expand sidebar ticker into scrollable dev morale dashboard with 15 new humorous stats
body:
Converts the single-card rotating ticker into a full-bottom scrollable ticker tape
with auto-scroll, pause-on-hover, and manual scroll support. Adds Bus Factor (with
Truck Number), WTFs/Min, Ballmer Peak, LGTM Rate, Nerd Snipe Factor, Yak Shave Depth,
Knowledge Half-Life, LOC/Pizza, TTMR, Legacy Gravity, JIRA vs Actual Velocity, Deploy
Anxiety, Rubber Duck Sessions, TODO Debt, Impostor Syndrome Index, and SO Dependency.

author: Blake
subject: feat: add session-based multi-tenant auth replacing insecure base64 tokens
body:
- Opaque session tokens (ss_ prefix) with server-side SHA-256 hash storage
- scrypt password hashing with transparent legacy SHA-256 migration on login
- React AuthContext with authFetch (auto Bearer token, auto-logout on 401)
- Session validation on mount via /api/auth/me endpoint
- Daily session cleanup cron via Vercel
- All API routes migrated from X-Org-Token to requireSession/getSession
- is_superadmin column on org_users for future admin auth upgrade

author: Blake
subject: fix: configure Stripe SDK for Vercel serverless (fetch HTTP client + pinned API version)
body:
Stripe SDK v20+ needs explicit fetch-based HTTP client on Vercel's edge runtime.
Also adds Stripe env vars to .env.example.

author: Blake
subject: fix: defer stripe_customer_id index to after ALTER ADD COLUMN in migration

author: Blake
subject: chore: add dev-dist to .gitignore

author: Blake
subject: feat: add PWA support, v1 API, Stripe billing, campaign alerts, consumer leads, and dashboard polish
body:
Major additions:
- PWA: service worker, install prompt, offline banner, push notifications
- API v1: RESTful endpoints for facilities, leads, tenants, units, webhooks
- Stripe: checkout sessions, billing portal, webhook handler, subscription flow
- Campaign Alerts view with severity levels and dismissal
- Consumer Leads view for tracking end-user leads through the funnel
- WhatsNew overhaul with commit reviews, deployment tags, and idea board
- Partner portal: developer tab, password reset, access code resend
- Client portal enhancements with expanded analytics

Dashboard polish:
- Sidebar: consumer-leads and alerts nav items
- Settings: expanded configuration options
- Landing pages: enhanced editor with template selector improvements
- Revenue intelligence, occupancy intelligence, seasonal playbook refinements
- Call tracking, GBP, UTM links, PMS data tab improvements

Infrastructure:
- CI workflow updates
- Database migration additions
- OpenAPI spec
- Pixel/attribution/analytics refinements
- useFetch and usePWA hooks

author: Blake
subject: refactor: split 5 monolithic components into sub-modules, add Vitest + build fixes
body:
Extract sub-components from the 5 largest files:
- BillingView (2051→180 lines) → billing/ (10 sub-components)
- SeasonalPlaybookTab (1495→580) → playbook/ (3 sub-components)
- RevenueIntelligence (1414→540) → revenue/ (6 sub-components)
- PartnerPortal (1477→629) → partner/ (5 sub-components)
- WhatsNew (1825→504) → whatsnew/ (5 sub-components)

Also:
- Add vitest.config.ts (separate from vite.config.ts for clean tsc -b)
- Add vitest, @testing-library/react, jsdom as devDependencies
- Exclude test files from tsconfig.app.json build
- Fix pre-existing TS errors in blog.ts, storedge-parser.ts, ab-testing.ts, sw.ts

author: Blake
subject: feat: add dashboard enhancements — activity log, call logs, pipeline improvements
body:
- Wire up Activity Log and Call Logs tabs with sidebar nav, command palette, and routing
- Add Campaign Alerts and Consumer Leads to command palette navigation
- Pipeline: conversion funnel visualization, 6 stat cards with subtitles, sort dropdown
  (newest, oldest, name, score, pipeline stage), dark-mode search input
- LeadCard: freshness indicators (Fresh/1-3d/3-7d/Xd), quick-advance button to next stage
- StatCard: dark mode support, subtitle prop, string value support
- NotificationPanel: individual dismiss (hover X), clear-all button
- ShortcutsModal: grouped layout (Navigation + Actions), added keys 7-9
- Select-all checkbox header with filtered CSV export
- Fix unused ChevronDown import in CallLogsView

author: Blake
subject: WIP on main: 3ab485b feat: refined sidebar design — color-coded groups, live badges, polished UI

author: Blake
subject: index on main: 3ab485b feat: refined sidebar design — color-coded groups, live badges, polished UI

author: Blake
subject: feat: refined sidebar design — color-coded groups, live badges, polished UI
body:
- Per-group accent colors (emerald/blue/violet/amber/rose/cyan/slate)
- Live badge counts on Pipeline and Kanban nav items
- Left border tree-lines connecting group items
- Hash (#) prefix on group labels for dev aesthetic
- Smoother animations, refined hover states, better tooltips
- Improved collapsed icon rail with group icons
- Added Activity Log and Call Logs nav items
- Mobile overlay slide-in animation

author: Blake
subject: security: remove remaining hardcoded admin key fallbacks
body:
Missed in 7b46a77 — process-drips.js still had an || fallback and
src-old/AdminDashboard.jsx had the key inline. Both now require
ADMIN_SECRET env var exclusively.

author: Blake
subject: feat: add React Router, Vitest test framework, and paginated admin leads
body:
- Migrate from manual view switching to React Router v6 with proper
  routes, URL params, and Link components (13 routes)
- Add Vitest + React Testing Library with 13 passing tests across
  consent utility, ConsentBanner, and ErrorBoundary
- Add server-side pagination to admin-leads API (page/limit/search/status
  query params with COUNT query and LIMIT/OFFSET)
- Update AdminDashboard with paginated fetching, Previous/Next UI,
  and replace all silent catch blocks with console.error logging
- Add test scripts to package.json and test step to CI workflow

author: Blake
subject: feat: add commit comments, flags, and notes APIs with WhatsNew enhancements
body:
- Add api/commit-comments.js, commit-flags.js, commit-notes.js endpoints
- Extend db/migrate.js schema for commit metadata tables
- Expand WhatsNew component with new changelog features
- Update commits.json data

author: Blake
subject: security: remove hardcoded admin keys, add rate limiting, and gate tracking behind consent
body:
- Create shared api/_auth.js module; replace hardcoded 'stowstack-admin-2024'
  fallback across all 60 API files with env-only ADMIN_SECRET (no default)
- Add api/_ratelimit.js using Upstash Redis; rate limit audit form to
  3 submissions/IP/hour with fail-open fallback
- Gate Meta Pixel and Google Ads initialization + client-side event firing
  behind user consent (src/utils/consent.ts)
- Add ConsentBanner component to main site and landing pages for GDPR/CCPA

author: Blake
subject: fix: normalize Blake/Blake Burkett as single author in ticker

author: Blake
subject: fix: remove unused variables in SidebarTicker to pass typecheck

author: Blake
subject: feat: hacker console sidebar nav + live stats ticker
body:
Replace 20-tab horizontal scrollbar with collapsible sidebar grouped
into 7 sections (Leads, Portfolio, Analytics, Revenue, Marketing,
Ops, System). Dark terminal aesthetic with CRT scanline overlay,
emerald glow effects, monospace fonts, and icon-rail collapse mode.

Live ticker in sidebar footer cycles through 22 stat cards pulled
from commits.json and admin API: dev streak, leaderboard, AI collab
ratio, speed records, peak coding hours, caffeine tracker, grind
index, codebase size estimates, bus factor, fun facts, and more.
Mini SVG sparklines, progress bars, and smooth card transitions.

Command palette updated with all 20 nav targets grouped by section.
Mobile responsive with hamburger slide-out overlay.

author: Blake
subject: overnight cowork session — stowstack content and strategy assets
body:
18 new files: site audit, competitive teardown, hero copy variants,
objection responses, PDF one-pager, Meta ad copy bank, landing page
copy, cold email sequence, sales call script, case study template,
LinkedIn posts, SEO keyword map, onboarding checklist, pricing page
copy, retargeting ads, priority fixes, and codebase audit/roadmap.

Code fixes: replace silent error catches with logged warnings in
ClientPortal, move hardcoded notification emails to env var in
audit-form, add global unhandled rejection handler in main.tsx.

author: Blake
subject: feat: add Physical vs Economic Occupancy Intelligence tab
body:
Dedicated occupancy analysis tool with dual-gauge visualization, gap decomposition
(vacancy/rate gap/discounts/delinquency), unit-type heatmap, move-in/out trends,
delinquency impact analysis, and auto-generated insights.

author: Blake
subject: feat: PMS data system, storEDGE CSV import, and Revenue Intelligence engine
body:
- Manual PMS data entry system (PMSDataTab) with unit mix, snapshots, specials
- storEDGE CSV auto-detection parser supporting 7 report types
- File upload UI with multi-file import and auto-detect preview
- Revenue Intelligence dashboard with 11 analysis sections:
  - Top metrics strip (MRR, lost revenue, ECRI opportunity, rate position)
  - Revenue optimization by unit type with rate/occupancy signals
  - Lost revenue calculator with per-unit-type breakdown
  - ECRI recommendation engine with tenant-level rate analysis
  - Rate variance heatmap (above/below street distribution)
  - Revenue trend (historical bar chart with move-in/out)
  - Facility health score (composite 0-100 across 5 dimensions)
  - Revenue waterfall (potential → vacancy/rate/delinquency → actual)
  - Scenario modeler (interactive what-if with 3 sliders)
  - Revenue per square foot analysis
  - Seasonal patterns (multi-year move-in/out by month)
  - Delinquency risk dashboard (aging buckets + recovery projection)
- New DB tables: tenant_rates, revenue_history, aging, length_of_stay, rent_roll
- API endpoints: facility-pms, storedge-import, revenue-intelligence
- PMS data hook (usePMSData) consumed in ClientPortal

author: angelo
subject: Make facility info editable in Overview tab
body:
Click Edit to toggle all facility fields into input mode: contact
name/email/phone, facility name/location, occupancy range (dropdown),
total units, biggest issue, notes, Google address, business phone,
website. Save persists to DB via expanded PATCH endpoint that now
supports all editable fields (not just status). Changes propagate
to parent facility list immediately.

author: angelo
subject: Add cost estimates to Google Ads Lab keyword selection
body:
Shows avg CPC, estimated clicks/day, estimated cost/day, and
estimated cost/month based on selected keywords and daily budget.
Updates live as keywords are toggled on/off.

author: angelo
subject: Feed active marketing plan into Google Ads keyword generation
body:
Keyword generator now checks for an active marketing plan and injects
target audiences, messaging pillars, bottleneck analysis, Google-specific
channel strategy, and assigned playbooks as context. Keywords are
weighted toward strategic priorities when a plan exists. Works
independently when no plan is present.

author: angelo
subject: Add B2B playbook, plan context in Creative, and Google Ads Laboratory
body:
B2B/Commercial playbook option added to Overview — targets contractors,
SMBs, e-commerce, document storage with specific messaging guidance.

Creative tab now shows active marketing plan as collapsible context bar
at the top — messaging pillars and target audiences visible while
generating copy, without leaving the tab.

Google Ads Lab (new tab): AI-generated keyword suggestions grouped by
intent (Brand, Generic, Unit Sizes, Features, Life Events, Competitor,
Long-tail). Campaign config: daily budget, geo radius, bid strategy
(maximize clicks/conversions/target CPA/manual), ad schedule, negative
keywords. Real-time campaign scoring (0-100) across 5 dimensions:
keyword relevance, budget efficiency, intent balance, competitive
position, geo focus. Warnings and suggestions update live as you
adjust settings. Checkbox keyword selection with CPC estimates,
search volume, and competition indicators.

author: angelo
subject: Fix truncated JSON: increase max_tokens to 4096 and add JSON repair

author: angelo
subject: Use claude-haiku-4-5 for marketing plan — matches working ad copy model

author: angelo
subject: Fix Anthropic model ID to claude-sonnet-4-5-20241022

author: angelo
subject: Fix model ID: claude-sonnet-4-6 not 4-5

author: angelo
subject: Expand Overview tab with business context, marketing plan, and playbook assignment
body:
New Overview tab replaces static read-only display with:
- Business Context section: upload competitor info, pricing sheets,
  branding docs, market research — all fed into marketing plan generation
- Seasonal Playbook assignment: select which playbooks apply to this
  facility (spring cleaning, summer moves, college, etc.)
- AI Marketing Plan generator: Claude Sonnet builds a full strategy
  using facility data + context docs + reviews + playbooks + spend
  analysis. Outputs: bottleneck analysis, target audiences, messaging
  pillars, channel strategy with budget %, content calendar, KPIs,
  and quick wins.
- Ad Spend Recommendation: portfolio optimizer scoring logic calculates
  budget tier, monthly range, and channel allocation with reasoning.

New DB tables: facility_context, marketing_plans.
New API routes: /api/facility-context, /api/marketing-plan.

author: angelo
subject: Fix CORS: proxy Runway videos through server for text compositing
body:
Runway's CDN doesn't send CORS headers, so canvas can't read video
frames directly. New /api/proxy-video endpoint fetches the video
server-side and serves it with proper CORS. Compositor downloads
video through proxy, creates a blob URL, then renders frame-by-frame.

author: angelo
subject: Add text overlay compositor for generated videos
body:
New Canvas-based post-processing pipeline: after Runway generates
clean b-roll, users add text layers (headline, subhead, CTA, minimal)
with per-layer controls for position, animation (slide-up, fade,
typewriter, hard cut), and timing (enter/exit percentage sliders).
Compositor renders video frame-by-frame onto canvas, overlays text
with proper typography (Space Grotesk headlines, DM Sans body), text
shadows, vignette, CTA pill backgrounds, and exports composited WebM.
Facility names restored in generation prompts. Pre-populated with
facility name as headline and "Reserve Your Unit" as CTA.

author: Blake
subject: Update dashboard components: churn prediction, GBP, remarketing, referrals, tenant billing, upsell
body:
Expand churn prediction with risk factor details, GBP tab with reviews/posts/insights,
move-out remarketing with sequence management, referrals with credit tracking,
tenant billing with payment history, and upsell engine with opportunity scoring.

author: Blake
subject: Add revenue ops billing system, reconciliation, P&L, collections, and platform expansions
body:
Replaces basic billing tab with full financial operations system: managed ad spend model
with tiered pricing, net-30 invoicing, referral network, ad spend reconciliation,
P&L statement, automated dunning sequences, payment method management, and growth
projections. Also includes attribution, GBP integration, consumer leads, churn
prediction, upsell engine, and move-out remarketing systems.

author: Blake
subject: Fix TypeScript errors blocking Vercel deploy
body:
- Remove unused imports in ReferralsView (ArrowUpRight, Sparkles, Clock, XCircle)
- Remove unused `dc` variable in TenantBillingView
- Remove invalid `title` prop from Lucide icons in TenantBillingView

author: Blake
subject: Add portfolio optimizer, referrals, seasonal playbooks, tenant billing, and call tracking
body:
- Portfolio Optimizer tab: scores facilities on vacancy, margin, demand, and momentum to recommend ad spend allocation
- Referrals system with API and dashboard view
- Seasonal playbook tab for campaign planning
- Tenant billing/upsell with churn predictions and move-out remarketing APIs
- Call tracking with Twilio webhook integration
- Partner portal and settings enhancements

author: Blake
subject: Add partner system expansion: self-serve signup, benchmarking, billing, and white-label emails
body:
- Self-serve partner signup with auto-generated credentials and welcome email
- Org-scoped activity feed API and UI
- White-label email templates (welcome, campaign_live, monthly_report, lead_notification)
- Portfolio benchmarking with CPL/ROAS comparisons across facilities
- Per-org billing breakdown with base fee + per-facility pricing
- Expanded admin PartnersView with facility assignment, benchmarks, billing, and activity tabs
- Partner portal: added Benchmarks and Billing tabs with live data

author: Blake
subject: Add white-label partner portal for facility management companies
body:
Introduces a multi-tenant organization system so regional management
companies (managing 50-200 facilities) can access a branded partner
portal with portfolio-level dashboards, team management, and
white-label branding controls.

- Database: organizations + org_users tables, facilities.organization_id FK
- API: /api/organizations (CRUD, login, invite), /api/org-users, /api/org-facilities
- Partner Portal (/partner): login, portfolio dashboard, facility detail,
  team invite/management, branding editor, org settings
- Admin: Partners tab for creating/managing partner organizations
- Landing pages: inherit org branding (logo, colors, white-label footer)

author: Blake
subject: Fix pre-existing TypeScript errors blocking Vercel deploy
body:
- TikTokCreator: cast content_json to Record for property access
- PartnerPortal: remove unused imports and variables
- PartnersView: remove unused Lucide icon imports

author: Blake
subject: Add open source plugin system with 10 integrations
body: PostHog, Umami, Chatwoot, Cal.com, Formbricks, Novu, n8n, Nominatim, GrapesJS, and Langfuse — all opt-in via env vars with free tiers. Events auto-fire to PostHog + Umami alongside existing Meta/Google tracking.

author: Blake
subject: Add partial-lead capture, recovery drip, and exit-intent system
body:
Captures abandoned landing page visitors field-by-field, scores them
behaviorally (scroll depth, time on page, fields completed), and
triggers a 3-step recovery email sequence (1hr, 24hr, 72hr) with
pre-filled return links and a $1 first month offer. Includes exit-intent
popup on landing pages, hot lead email alerts for high-score abandoners,
and a Recovery tab in the admin dashboard with real-time metrics.

author: Blake
subject: Add multi-platform creative generation, A/B testing API, and dashboard enhancements
body:
- Expand facility-creatives API with multi-platform copy generation (Meta, Google RSA, landing pages, email drips)
- Add A/B testing API endpoint with chi-square significance, variant assignment, and event tracking
- Expand CreativeTab with multi-platform ad card components and approval workflow
- Add new DB migration tables for creative briefs, ad variations, and platform connections
- Streamline LandingPageView and update AdPreviewTab/PublishTab

author: Blake
subject: Add shareable audit reports with public view, admin management, and sharing tools
body:
- Public SharedAuditView at /audit/:slug with animated score ring, ROI snapshot,
  vacancy cost analysis, projected performance, and recommendations
- Print/PDF support, share menu (copy link, email), expiration countdown,
  dynamic OG meta tags for social sharing
- Admin SharedAuditsView tab: list all shared audits with stats, copy link,
  open, extend 90 days, reactivate expired, or revoke
- API: /api/shared-audits (GET list, DELETE revoke, PATCH extend)
- Share button on admin AuditReportSection with copy-to-clipboard URL bar
- audit-load API now returns expiresAt for countdown display

author: angelo
subject: Inject core aesthetic DNA into all video generations
body:
Every prompt now carries a baseline style layer: warm muted palette,
subtle film grain, intentional negative space, slow deliberate camera
movement, quiet confidence. Template prompts rewritten to match —
contemplative pacing, tactile textures, every frame a considered
photograph. Claude enhancer guided toward restrained premium brand
aesthetic. Style presets cleaned up (renamed wes_anderson to storybook,
added textile/textured option, removed all brand references). Added
new Tactile/Textured style preset. Core style auto-appended to all
prompts with 1000-char safety trim.

author: angelo
subject: Remove brand/person references from style presets to pass moderation
body:
Runway blocks prompts with real names. Removed Wes Anderson, Nike,
DJI Mavic references. Renamed to 'Storybook Symmetry' with generic
visual descriptors instead.

author: angelo
subject: Fix moderation failures: strip facility names and locations from prompts
body:
Runway's moderation was flagging prompts containing business names and
addresses. Templates now use generic descriptions without facility data.
Claude prompt enhancer explicitly instructed to never include names,
addresses, or on-screen text. Prompts kept under 150 words.

author: angelo
subject: Remove dialogue from video templates, add visual style selector
body:
All templates now explicitly exclude people talking/dialogue — focused
on b-roll, facility footage, hands-only packing, and visual transforms.
Replaced Customer Testimonial with Hero B-Roll establishing shot.
Added 10 visual style presets (Cinematic, Vintage, Wes Anderson, Drone,
Minimal, Bold, Moody, iPhone/Authentic, Timelapse) that append style
instructions to the generation prompt. Style selector shows as pill
buttons in the generation form.

author: angelo
subject: Fix text_to_video model: gen4_turbo not supported, use gen4.5

author: angelo
subject: Add Custom Prompt template, fix stock images with real storage photos
body:
New 'Custom Prompt' video template with auto-opening prompt editor for
full creative control. Replaced all curated stock images with verified
Unsplash photos of actual self-storage facilities, storage hallways,
moving boxes, packing supplies, and decluttering scenes.

author: angelo
subject: Fix Runway model: use gen4_turbo for both image and text to video
body: gen3a_turbo is not valid for image_to_video endpoint.

author: angelo
subject: Fix Runway API hostname to dev portal

author: angelo
subject: Fix Runway API: correct base URL, ratio format, and model selection
body:
Was using api.dev.runwayml.com (wrong), ratio '9:16' (must be
'720:1280'), and gen3a_turbo for text_to_video (unsupported).
Fixed to api.runwayml.com, 720:1280 portrait ratio, gen4_turbo
for text-to-video, gen3a_turbo for image-to-video.

author: angelo
subject: Add prompt editing, regeneration, and publish flow to Video AI
body:
Videos now show editable prompts: click "Regenerate with Edits" on any
completed/failed video to tweak the AI prompt and re-run generation.
Direct prompt editor on the generation form for advanced control.
Publish button on completed videos links to the Publish tab. API
accepts promptOverride to bypass auto-generated prompts. Failed
generations show "Edit prompt and retry" option.

author: angelo
subject: Add AI Video Generator with 6 self-storage video templates
body:
New Video AI tab with template-based video generation via Runway ML.
Templates: Facility Showcase (image-to-video walkthrough), Customer
Testimonial (AI person speaking to camera), Seasonal Promo (dynamic
transformation), Quick CTA (5s dramatic reveal), Packing Tips
(educational overhead shot), Before/After (cluttered to organized).
Claude refines prompts with facility-specific data. Async generation
with polling, video preview, download, and prompt inspection.
Requires RUNWAY_API_KEY env var.

author: angelo
subject: Add Canvas video export to TikTok Creator
body:
Renders slideshow to WebM video via Canvas + MediaRecorder at 1080x1920
30fps. Ken Burns effects computed per-frame, text overlays with word
wrap and fade-in animations, crossfade transitions between slides,
gradient overlays. Progress bar during render, auto-downloads the
finished video. Falls back gracefully on CORS-blocked images.

author: angelo
subject: Add TikTok Content Creator with slideshow composer and animated preview
body:
New TikTok tab in facility detail with slideshow builder for organic
content. Features: auto-generate slideshows from facility images and
ad copy, Ken Burns effects (zoom in/out, pan left/right), per-slide
text overlays with positioning, adjustable timing, 9:16 preview with
TikTok UI chrome, drag-to-reorder slides, caption/hashtag editor,
and playback preview with animated transitions.

author: angelo
subject: Suppress unused config field TS error in pixel.ts

author: angelo
subject: Fix pixel.ts unused var build error, add TikTok to Publish tab

author: angelo
subject: Add TikTok to Publish tab with OAuth flow and content posting
body:
TikTok platform card in Publish tab with OAuth connect flow via
TikTok Login Kit v2. Callback handles token exchange and user info
fetch. Publish API posts photos with ad copy as caption including
storage-related hashtags. Requires TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY and
TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET env vars to activate.

author: Blake
subject: Cleanup: security headers, error boundary, console.log removal, .nvmrc
body:
- Add security headers to vercel.json (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options,
  Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
- Add React ErrorBoundary wrapping the app in main.tsx
- Remove ~35 console.log statements from production code (src/ and api/)
- Add .nvmrc pinning Node 20
- Fix missing rel="noopener noreferrer" on external link in LandingPageView
- Update CLAUDE.md to reflect current codebase state (TypeScript, Postgres,
  populated component directories, CI)

author: Blake
subject: Add GitHub Actions CI and SEO meta tags
body:
CI workflow runs lint, typecheck, and build on PRs and pushes to main.
OG/Twitter meta tags and canonical URL for social sharing previews,
with PNG OG image converted from existing SVG.

author: Blake
subject: Fix remaining unused imports and add typecheck script
body:
- Remove unused Users import from App.tsx
- Remove unused useRef import from AdminGuide.tsx
- Add npm run typecheck convenience script

author: Blake
subject: Fix TS errors: remove unused imports and fix tooltip formatter types

author: Blake
subject: Fix TypeScript errors: tooltip formatter types and unused variables

author: Blake
subject: Fix unused imports and tooltip formatter type in DemoDashboard

author: Blake
subject: Auto-populate What's New from GitHub API on every deploy
body:
- Build script now fetches commits via GitHub API (works on Vercel shallow clones)
- Falls back to local git log for dev
- Fixed vercel.json buildCommand to run full npm build pipeline

author: Blake
subject: Migrate lead pipeline from Redis to PostgreSQL
body:
Move all 15 Redis-dependent API routes to use Neon Postgres via the
shared _db.js pool. Extend facilities table with pipeline columns
(pipeline_status, follow_up_date, access_code, etc.) and add 10 new
tables: lead_notes, activity_log, clients, client_campaigns,
client_onboarding, drip_sequences, shared_audits, audit_report_cache,
pms_reports, and ideas. Removes Redis imports from all migrated routes
while preserving API response shapes for frontend compatibility.

author: Blake
subject: Decompose AdminDashboard.tsx monolith into 21 modular component files
body:
Split the 6,964-line AdminDashboard.tsx into focused modules under
src/components/dashboard/. Each tab, sub-tab, and reusable component
now lives in its own file with local types and imports. The main file
is now a ~600-line thin shell handling auth, state, and tab routing.

author: Blake
subject: Add .env.example documenting all required environment variables

author: Blake
subject: Add full-funnel tracking infrastructure, landing page templates, and A/B testing
body:
Core tracking utilities: UTM capture with multi-touch attribution, typed event
taxonomy (8 conversion events), Meta CAPI server-side firing, Google Ads offline
conversions, client-side pixel manager with dedup. A/B testing framework with
deterministic visitor assignment, weighted splits, and chi-square significance
testing. Three landing page template variants (Standard, Aggressive, Local) built
for zero-nav conversion with embedded storEDGE placeholder. Operational docs for
new facility onboarding, tracking setup, and storEDGE integration.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add automated lead drip sequences with hourly cron and admin UI
body:
New drip system auto-enrolls leads on audit form submission into a 4-step
email sequence (Day 2/5/10/21) with personalized content based on facility
challenge. Hourly Vercel Cron processes due emails via Resend, auto-cancels
when lead status changes. Admin Sequences tab shows all drips with progress
bars, history, and pause/resume/cancel controls. Two new email templates:
value_add (challenge-specific tips) and last_chance (soft final touch).

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add What's New admin tab with commit analytics, timeline, and idea dump
body:
Build-time commit history generator (scripts/generate-commits.js) extracts
git log with file stats, auto-categorizes by type and area, runs before
each build. Overview section shows velocity, activity chart, contribution
heatmap, category/area breakdown charts, and contributor stats. Timeline
section adds file change counts, daily/weekly toggle, new-since-last-visit
badges. Idea Dump section with Redis-backed CRUD API for capturing and
prioritizing brainstorm ideas with voting, status workflow, and filtering.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add blog system, admin guide, and remaining dependencies
body:
Includes blog components, content markdown files, utility modules,
and config changes that were missing from the previous commit.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add UTM link builder with click tracking, QR codes, and CSV export
body:
New facility sub-tab for creating tracked campaign links with short-code
redirect endpoint (/api/r), per-link click counting, QR code generation
for print/signage, search/filter/sort, duplicate links, and CSV export.
Also includes landing page CRUD API and blog router improvements.

author: angelo
subject: Fix publish flow: auto-select platform, show errors and success messages
body:
selectedConnection was null unless manually picked from dropdown.
Now auto-selects first connected platform. Errors from the API are
displayed inline instead of silently swallowed. Success message
confirms publish and links to Ads Manager.

author: angelo
subject: Build full Meta campaign pipeline: Campaign → Ad Set → Ad (all PAUSED)
body:
Previously only created an ad creative with no campaign structure.
Now creates complete Campaign (OUTCOME_TRAFFIC) → Ad Set (with default
targeting, $10/day budget) → Creative → Ad, all PAUSED so nothing
spends money until the operator reviews and activates in Ads Manager.
Links directly to the campaign in Ads Manager from publish history.

author: angelo
subject: Remove invalid Meta OAuth scopes that require app review

author: angelo
subject: Fix OAuth redirect URI to use production domain instead of deployment URL
body:
VERCEL_URL returns the unique deployment URL, not the custom domain,
causing Facebook OAuth to reject the redirect. Now uses www.stowstack.co
in production.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add Facebook data deletion flow, logo, and Meta platform compliance

author: angelo
subject: Add Publish This Ad button to Ad Preview tab
body: Links directly to the Publish tab from the ad preview mockup.

author: angelo
subject: Add Publish tab with Meta and Google Ads platform integration scaffolding
body:
New DB tables: platform_connections (OAuth tokens per facility/platform),
publish_log (tracks every ad push with external IDs and error details).
OAuth callback routes for Meta (/api/auth/meta/callback) and Google Ads
(/api/auth/google/callback) handle token exchange and account discovery.
Publish API (/api/publish-ad) pushes approved creatives to connected
platforms with full audit logging. Publish tab UI shows connection status,
credential requirements, ad/image/platform selectors, and publish history.
Ready for credentials — add META_APP_ID, META_APP_SECRET for Meta and
GOOGLE_ADS_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_ADS_CLIENT_SECRET, GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN
for Google Ads in Vercel env vars to activate.

author: angelo
subject: Add deep website scraper, storage-specific stock images, and ad preview system
body:
Scraper now crawls up to 15 pages, extracts page copy/services/promotions,
and covers broader page types (pricing, FAQ, blog, testimonials). Stock
library replaced with self-storage relevant categories (exterior, interior,
moving, packing, lifestyle, vehicle) served via new API endpoint with
optional Unsplash integration. New Ad Preview tab renders image+copy
mockups for Instagram story/post, Facebook feed, and Google display formats.

author: angelo
subject: Add asset management with drag-and-drop upload, website scraper, and stock library
body:
API:
- api/facility-assets.js: upload files to Vercel Blob, save URL-based assets,
  list/delete assets per facility. Supports binary upload and JSON URL saves.
- api/scrape-website.js: free website scraper using cheerio — extracts images,
  videos, meta tags, structured data (JSON-LD), contact info (phone/email),
  business hours. Saves scraped images to assets table and updates facility
  record with discovered contact info. No API key needed.

Frontend (Assets tab in Facilities detail view):
- Drag-and-drop upload zone for photos, videos, PDFs
- Website scraper: enter any URL, extracts and saves all usable images,
  surfaces videos, contact info, and page headings
- Stock library: 12 curated free-use images (exterior, interior, lifestyle)
  with category filter, one-click add to facility
- Asset grid organized by type (photos, videos, documents) with source labels
  (Uploaded, Scraped, Stock) and delete controls

Dependencies: @vercel/blob, cheerio

author: angelo
subject: Add creative review UI to Facilities tab with full ad variation management
body:
- New api/facility-creatives.js: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE for ad variations per facility
  - POST triggers Claude Haiku to generate 4 Meta ad variations, saves to ad_variations table
  - PATCH supports approve/reject (with feedback)/edit content, auto-updates facility status
  - Supports regeneration with reviewer feedback incorporated into the prompt
- Facilities tab rewritten with list → detail navigation
  - List view: sortable table with facility name, location, status, rating, occupancy, units
  - Detail view with sub-tabs: Overview, Creative, Assets
  - Overview: contact info, facility data, Google data, photos, reviews, status dropdown
  - Creative: generate/regenerate ad copy, version-grouped variation cards with:
    - Meta ad preview mockup (primaryText, headline, description, CTA)
    - Approve / Reject with notes / Edit inline / Unapprove controls
    - Character count validation on edit (125 primary, 40 headline, 30 description)
    - Version history with batch timestamps
  - Assets: placeholder for future media management

author: angelo
subject: Add Facilities tab to admin dashboard with Postgres pipeline
body:
- New api/admin-facilities.js: GET returns all facilities joined with latest places_data; PATCH updates pipeline status
- AdminDashboard.tsx: adds 'facilities' tab showing live Postgres data with expandable cards, status controls, photos, and reviews

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Rewrite all site copy to align with STOWSTACK_CORE.md positioning
body:
Replace business-identity.md with comprehensive STOWSTACK_CORE.md as the
founding document. Rewrite all user-facing copy in App.tsx to position
StowStack as a full-funnel acquisition and conversion system (not an
agency): ad-specific landing pages, embedded storEDGE rental flow,
full-funnel attribution, and revenue-based A/B testing. Update all data
constants, section headers, hero, pricing, FAQs, testimonials, CTA, and
footer. Add site-copy markdown reference files. Update meta tags and
all CLAUDE.md references.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Rewrite guide page as client-only content, removing admin/backend sections
body:
The public /guide page now shows only client-relevant content: welcome,
login instructions, dashboard KPIs, chart explanations, onboarding wizard,
messages, campaign goals, monthly digest, and FAQ. All admin sections
(pipeline, lead scoring, email templates, CSV export, audit reports,
campaign alerts, analytics) have been removed to prevent exposing
internal operations publicly. Admin guide will be added separately at
/admin-guide.

author: angelo
subject: Surface Places API error details in response for debugging

author: angelo
subject: Add Places API response logging for debugging

author: angelo
subject: Remove type=storage filter from Places search — too restrictive

author: angelo
subject: Trigger redeploy to pick up renamed GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY

author: angelo
subject: Trigger redeploy to pick up GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY env var

author: angelo
subject: Fire facility lookup after form submission to scrape Google Places data

author: angelo
subject: Wire audit form to API with all required fields
body:
- CTASection now posts to /api/audit-form with controlled state
- Added phone, location, total units, biggest challenge fields
- Restored full server-side validation for all required fields
- Returns facilityId from Postgres on success

author: angelo
subject: Add creative pipeline: facility lookup, ad copy generation, Postgres storage
body:
- api/_db.js: shared Postgres connection pool utility
- api/facility-lookup.js: Google Places lookup — pulls photos, reviews, rating
- api/generate-copy.js: Claude-powered Meta ad copy generator (4 angle variations)
- api/audit-form.js: persist leads to Postgres facilities table alongside Redis
- db/migrate.js: schema migration (facilities, audits, places_data, briefs, ad_variations, assets)
- package.json: add pg dependency

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add kanban board, notification center, command palette, dark mode, billing tracker, settings page, and keyboard shortcuts
body:
New admin dashboard features: drag-and-drop kanban pipeline view, notification
center with bell icon and unread badge, command palette (Cmd+K) for global
search and quick actions, dark mode with persistent toggle, client billing/
invoice tracker with KPI summary, settings page with company info and
notification preferences, and keyboard shortcuts (1-6 for tabs, R/N/?).

New API endpoints: /api/notifications (aggregated alerts), /api/admin-settings
(preferences CRUD), /api/client-billing (invoice management).

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add guide page, messaging, bulk actions, CSV export, follow-ups, campaign goals, and monthly digest
body:
New features: /guide how-to page with full platform documentation, client-admin
message threads, bulk lead status updates, CSV lead export, follow-up date
reminders with overdue detection, campaign goal tracking with progress bars,
and monthly performance digest comparing last 2 months.

New API endpoints: /api/client-messages (dual-auth message thread),
/api/export-leads (CSV download). Modified: admin-leads.js (followUpDate),
client-campaigns.js (PATCH monthlyGoal).

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add audit report engine, campaign health alerts, and quick email templates
body:
- api/audit-report.js: generates marketing audit with vacancy cost analysis,
  market opportunity scoring, projected ROI, competitive insights, and
  6 actionable recommendations. Supports caching and force regeneration.
- api/campaign-alerts.js: scans client campaign data for CPL spikes, ROAS
  drops, lead droughts, spend pacing issues, and positive milestones.
  Returns severity-sorted alerts with critical/warning/info levels.
- api/send-template.js: 6 pre-built email templates (follow-up, audit
  delivery, proposal, check-in, onboarding reminder, campaign update)
  sent via Resend with lead data interpolation and activity logging.
- AdminDashboard: integrated AuditReportSection (generate/view inline),
  EmailTemplatePicker (one-click send), and AlertsBanner (portfolio alerts).

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add lead analytics, scoring engine, and activity log
body:
- Lead Analytics API (/api/lead-analytics): pipeline conversion rate,
  avg days to sign, weekly lead velocity, funnel distribution, lost rate
- Lead Scoring Engine (/api/lead-score): scores leads 0-100 based on
  facility size, occupancy urgency, issue type, pipeline progress,
  recency, and engagement signals (onboarding, notes, PMS uploads)
- Activity Log (/api/activity-log): records lead creation, status changes,
  notes, PMS uploads as timestamped events in Redis lists (global + per-lead)
- Admin dashboard Insights tab with KPI cards, funnel chart, velocity
  bar chart, and activity feed timeline
- Lead score badges (grade + score) on each LeadCard in pipeline view
- Activity logging wired into admin-leads.js PATCH handler

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add client onboarding wizard, demo dashboard, portfolio analytics, and client portal charts
body:
- Client onboarding wizard: 5-step form (facility details, demographics, unit mix,
  competitor intel, ad preferences) with auto-save, validation, and review step.
  Accessible from both admin dashboard and client portal. New API endpoint with
  dual auth (admin key or client credentials).
- Demo dashboard: interactive simulated dashboard at /demo with month playback,
  animated KPIs, charts, and lead activity feed for Lakeview Self Storage.
- Admin portfolio tab: aggregate campaign analytics across all signed clients
  with KPI cards, monthly charts, budget allocation bars, client performance
  cards with sparklines, and rankings.
- Client portal charts: CPL trend, leads vs move-ins, and ROAS trend charts
  added to the client dashboard when campaign data is available.
- Marketing scorecard: interactive self-assessment quiz on the marketing site.
- Vite config: added Vercel-style serverless function plugin for local dev.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Move redesign to root for production deployment
body:
- Replace root src/ with redesign (React + TypeScript + shadcn/ui)
- Old site preserved in src-old/ for reference
- Merge package.json: add shadcn/radix deps, switch to Tailwind 3.4 + PostCSS
- Switch vite config to TypeScript with path aliases
- Add tsconfig files for TypeScript compilation
- Build passes cleanly

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add full site redesign + team bios, fix hero/engine section contrast
body:
- Complete redesign in redesign/stowstack-redesign using React + TypeScript + shadcn/ui
- Reposition branding from "Meta ads agency" to "demand engine" throughout
- Add team bios for Blake, Angelo, and Anna with operator-first copy
- Fix white-on-white issues: hero CTA button, Occupancy Engine section (dark bg)
- Fix audit banner overlapping nav with proper z-index + MutationObserver
- Add interactive vacancy cost calculator and ROI payoff calculator
- Add scroll reveal animations, mobile CTA bar, back-to-top button
- Update main app with shared audit view, creative studio, and audit intake form

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add admin pipeline dashboard + PMS upload portal
body:
Admin Dashboard (stowstack.co nav -> Admin):
- Pipeline tracker showing all audit leads with status progression
- 7 stages: Submitted -> Form Sent -> Form Done -> Audit Done -> Call Set -> Client -> Lost
- Click-to-expand lead cards with contact info, notes, status buttons
- Pipeline visualization bar, stat cards, search + filter
- Protected with X-Admin-Key header

PMS Upload Portal (stowstack.co/upload or nav -> PMS):
- Operators upload CSV exports from storEDGE, SiteLink, etc.
- Supports unit inventory, rent roll, occupancy, move-in/out reports
- Parses client-side with PapaParse, stores in Redis
- Sends notification email to blake + anna
- Auto-links to matching lead in pipeline

Audit form now saves leads to Redis:
- Every intake form submission creates a lead record in KV
- Status set to 'form_sent' automatically
- Pipeline tracking starts from first touch

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Rewrite auto-reply email: human tone, diagnostic form prompt, call scheduling
body:
- Removed all em dashes, humanized language throughout
- No mention of AI - positioned as bespoke manual audit
- Prompts operator to fill out diagnostic form (10 min, no reports needed)
- Asks for call availability to review results
- Added Blake's cell (269-929-8541) and email (blake@storepawpaw.com)
- Reply-to goes to blake@storepawpaw.com + anna@storepawpaw.com
- Footer explains noreply, directs to reply-all, mentions Anna for support
- Subject: "We're working on your [Facility] audit"

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Update auto-reply to prompt diagnostic form + CC anna on all emails
body:
- Auto-reply now directs operators to fill out the Google Form diagnostic
- Explains it takes ~10 minutes, no reports needed, good questions
- Includes CTA button linking to https://shorturl.at/EWu5y
- CC anna@storepawpaw.com on both notification and auto-reply emails

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Use noreply@stowstack.co for auto-reply sender address

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Use verified stowstack.co domain for outbound emails
body:
Sends from @stowstack.co (professional branding) while receiving
at blake@urkovro.resend.app until real mailboxes are set up.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Update Resend email addresses to use resend.dev sender and urkovro.resend.app recipient
body:
Switches from custom domain (stowstack.co) to Resend defaults so emails
work without custom domain verification.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add shareable audit links and revenue decay projector
body:
Two new features for the facility diagnostic tool:

1. "What Happens If You Do Nothing" decay projector - models 3 revenue
   scenarios (do nothing, quick wins, full plan) over 18 months with
   interactive Recharts visualization and 12-month summary cards

2. Shareable audit links via Upstash Redis - operators can share audit
   results via clean URLs (stowstack.co/audit/facility-name-xxxx) with
   90-day TTL, view tracking, and StowStack CTA banner for shared views

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Overhaul diagnostic: Haiku for speed, compact prompt, robust JSON repair
body:
- Switch from Sonnet to Haiku (3-5x faster token generation, completes
  within Vercel's 60s streaming limit)
- Drastically compress system prompt: strict limits on flags per category
  (2 red, 1 yellow, 1 green, 2 benchmarks), max 5 action plan items
- max_tokens 16384 (Haiku's full capacity)
- Rewrite JSON repair: proper brace/bracket stack tracking, handles
  truncated strings, trailing commas, and unclosed nested structures
- Accept partial results in frontend rather than hard-failing
- Removed retry loop (wastes time on timeout-bound functions)

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Fix truncated audit response: increase tokens, add conciseness rules, repair truncated JSON
body:
- Bumped max_tokens to 16000
- Added prompt instructions to keep text concise and always complete the JSON
- Frontend attempts to repair truncated JSON by closing open braces/brackets

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Fix streaming: write Claude tokens directly as response body
body:
Use stream.on('text') to write each token to the response, keeping
the connection alive. Frontend parses the full streamed text as JSON.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Fix diagnostic timeout: stream Claude response to stay within Vercel limits
body:
Vercel Hobby plan has 10s limit for buffered responses but 60s for
streaming. Switched to streaming the Claude API call and parsing the
final JSON on the frontend.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Configure Vercel: use npm, set framework to vite

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add facility diagnostic tool with AI-powered audit dashboard
body:
CSV upload → Claude API analysis → interactive dashboard with 9 category
scorecards, conversion funnel, findings panel, action plan, revenue impact,
competitor snapshot, operator alignment, and StowStack CTA. Includes DOCX
report export and dark/light mode toggle.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Flatten project structure: move Vite app to root for Vercel
body:
Moved all source files from "vite +react stowstack v1/" to the project
root so Vercel can build and serve the app without subdirectory hacks.
Merged package.json, updated vercel.json, and updated CLAUDE.md to
reflect the new layout.

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Remove node_modules from repo, update gitignore

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Update audit form API

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Remove node_modules from repo, update gitignore

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add audit intake form, Vercel API backend, CTA section

author: Blake Burkett
subject: Add audit intake form + API backend + CTA section
